tasks.title: Scaffold Next.js 15 App Router (TypeScript, src/)
tasks.description: Create package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.mjs, postcss.config.mjs, tailwind.config.ts, components.json, app/ layout, and src/ tree. No Pages Router.

tasks.title: Install Tailwind v4 and lock @theme tokens in globals.css
tasks.description: Paste the full @theme block from Design_System §2.1–§2.5 (color/radius/spacing/motion) for dark (default) and light variants. shadcn token names are non-negotiable.

tasks.title: Load Inter, Fraunces, JetBrains Mono via next/font (self-hosted)
tasks.description: Expose fonts as CSS variables (--font-sans, --font-serif, --font-mono) and wire into @theme font-family tokens.

tasks.title: Build typography scale utilities (text-display-xl → text-phase)
tasks.description: Implement the full type scale from Design_System §3 as Tailwind v4 utilities using @utility blocks.

tasks.title: Install shadcn/ui Essential components only (§9.1)
tasks.description: button, input, textarea, card, dialog, dropdown-menu, tooltip, sonner, tabs, avatar, badge, separator. No Important or Skip-for-MVP installs.

tasks.title: Build <RoundedShell /> layout primitive
tasks.description: src/components/shell/RoundedShell.tsx per Design_System §4. Desktop (≥1024): pinned 240px sidebar. Tablet (768–1023): collapsed 64px rail. Mobile (≤767): sidebar replaced by bottom tab bar; shell-gap collapses to 0.

tasks.title: Zustand UI store (theme, sidebarCollapsed, reducedMotionOverride)
tasks.description: src/stores/ui-store.ts persisted to localStorage. src/lib/theme.ts applies the .dark / :root.light class on <html> based on store + system preference.

tasks.title: src/types/film-state.ts — 12-value state enum
tasks.description: Duplicate the canonical enum (pending, parsing, cie_building, character_refs, scene_images_pending, voice_synthesis, music_composition, scene_assembly, final_concat, complete, error, canceled). TODO marker to migrate to @clevroy/types once the shared package exists.

tasks.title: Visual-check page at /dev/tokens
tasks.description: app/(dev)/tokens/page.tsx renders every color, radius, spacing, typography, and motion token plus both theme variants, for Axios to verify fidelity before other agents build on top.

tasks.title: Verify with next build and write coordination.md
tasks.description: Run next build cleanly, then post a status note at /coordination.md pinging Axios.

metadata.description: Leia — Foundation & Design System. Scaffolds Next.js 15 and locks design tokens so every other agent can build on top.

tasks.title: Foundation: film-state enum + copy module (phaseNarration + scene/activity entries)
tasks.description: src/types/film-state.ts holds the 12-state enum with a TODO to migrate to @clevroy/types. src/lib/copy.ts centralizes every user-facing string this stream touches: the full Design_System §8.3 phase→copy table, sceneStripAriaLabel (CC-5), activityFeed labels. A reserved divider at the bottom of copy.ts is where Stratum appends its Realtime event formatters.

tasks.title: <SceneStrip /> component (live + browse modes)
tasks.description: src/components/scene-strip/ per Design_System §8.5. 44×44 mobile / 56×56 desktop pills, 10px radius, 8px gap. Four states (empty/pending/ready/active) plus an error state per EC-G4. Roving tabindex (CC-4), aria-label="Scene {n}, {status}", throttled polite live region for 'Scene N ready.' transitions (CC-5). Pulse disabled under prefers-reduced-motion (CC-2). Auto-scrolls the active pill to horizontal center. Exposes mode: 'live' | 'browse' so Kaiser can reuse it on the Results page.

tasks.title: <ActivityFeed /> component
tasks.description: src/components/activity-feed/ per Design_System §8.6 + EC-G7. HH:MM:SS local timestamps. Color+icon states (● active, ✓ complete, ! warning, ✕ error) — never color alone (CC-5). Auto-scroll while user is at bottom; 'Jump to latest' pill when scrolled up >40px. DOM cap 50 desktop / 30 mobile via matchMedia; older events behind 'View earlier events (N)' collapsible button, expanded in batches of 50 with a TODO to swap in @tanstack/react-virtual. aria-live='polite' throttled to one announcement per 3s.

tasks.title: <PhaseNarration /> component
tasks.description: src/components/phase-narration/ per Design_System §8.3. Fraunces italic 28px headline + Inter muted subline, centered. Framer Motion AnimatePresence crossfade — outgoing 200ms, incoming 450ms with 100ms overlap. useReducedMotion collapses to a single 150ms crossfade (CC-2). aria-live='polite' on the region makes this the canonical screen-reader source of truth for generation phase (CC-5). State→copy comes from src/lib/copy.ts.

tasks.title: Coordination: tasks.json entry + coordination.md note
tasks.description: Add this 'lumen' tag to .taskmaster/tasks/tasks.json. Post a status note to coordination.md for Axios — flag the agent-name collision (the scaffold agent is already using tag 'leia', and this stream was briefed with the same placeholder); pinged Axios to assign a canonical name. Also flag deps on Leia's globals.css, Fantem's CenterStage for integration, and Stratum's copy.ts additions + Realtime ActivityFeedEntry feed.

metadata.description: Streaming UI that wraps Fantem's <CenterStage /> during generation: <SceneStrip />, <ActivityFeed />, <PhaseNarration />, plus the shared state→copy table. Placeholder tag name — awaiting a canonical assignment from Axios (see coordination.md).

tasks.title: Define FilmSummary / Film / FilmsListResponse shapes
tasks.description: src/types/film.ts — response shapes for GET /api/films (Backend_Handoff §8.3). Keep Leia's src/types/film-state.ts untouched (she owns its shape). Cursor-paginated list response, sort enum, helper isFilmInProgress.

tasks.title: Append Leon copy section to src/lib/copy.ts
tasks.description: Add Home, Projects, FilmCard, and empty-state strings under a clearly labeled '// Leon —' section, matching the per-agent section pattern Leia established.

tasks.title: Build FilmCard component family
tasks.description: src/components/film-card/: presentational FilmCard with cover, title, scene count, created date; three-dot overflow (Rename, Duplicate, Delete); 'New' badge until clicked (use-seen-films.ts local store); skeleton matching real layout shape; delete confirmation modal copy 'Delete this film? It can't be recovered.' [Keep it] [Delete it]; block delete when in-progress (EC-N9) with tooltip 'Still being shot. Cancel first, then delete.'.

tasks.title: Build empty-state components
tasks.description: src/components/empty-states/: NoFilmsEmptyState ('No films yet. Paste a script and we'll start shooting.'), FilmNotFound (EC-N8 — identical 404/403 'We couldn't find that film' state), FilmRestore (soft-deleted within 30-day window with Restore CTA), FilmInProgressCard (EC-G3 — used at top of Home recent films row).

tasks.title: Implement /home page
tasks.description: app/(app)/home/page.tsx per Design_System §7.2. H1 'Welcome back, {first_name}', films-left subline + 'Buy more films' link, full-width 'Start a new film' primary card, horizontal Recent films row (max 8, 'View all' to /projects), Film-in-progress card (EC-G3), NoFilmsEmptyState branch. Skeletons matching layout; swap to 'Still loading your films…' after 3s.

tasks.title: Implement /projects page
tasks.description: app/(app)/projects/page.tsx per Design_System §7.3. H1 'Your Films', search input + sort dropdown + 'New film' button toolbar; responsive grid (4/3/2/1 at desktop/tablet/mobile/narrow); useInfiniteFilms via Stratum; intersection observer for infinite scroll; FilmCard rows; same empty state as Home; skeleton grid + 3s 'Still loading' swap.

tasks.title: Coordination note + Stratum hook contract
tasks.description: Prepend a Leon entry to coordination.md documenting (a) what's shipped, (b) the exact useUser / useRecentFilms / useInProgressFilm / useInfiniteFilms / useDeleteFilm / useRenameFilm / useDuplicateFilm / useRestoreFilm hook contracts I depend on from Stratum, (c) Leia scaffold deps still missing (app/ directory, globals.css with @theme, shadcn ui components, RoundedShell), (d) Nemi handoff for app/(app)/films/[id]/page.tsx — Nemi composes my FilmNotFound/FilmRestore for non-success branches.

metadata.description: Leon — Home, Projects, Empty States, FilmCard. Low-animation, TanStack-Query-heavy. Blocked on Leia (app/, globals.css, shadcn UI install, RoundedShell) and Stratum (useFilms hook family) for end-to-end verification.
